calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: The following four cases were called together:
1) PED-12-295651 Velva Perieff vs. Rosana Bratt-Perieff
2) PED-12-295652 Velva Perieff vs. Steve Perieff
3) PED-12-295686 Steve Perieff vs. Alexander Perieff
4) PED-12-295687 Steve Perieff vs. Gregory Perieff

Appearances: James Bridgman for and with Steve Perieff and Rosana Bratt-Perieff. Kevin Ford for and with Velva Perieff.

Mr. Bridgeman reported that there was an inspection of the house last Friday but he did not get the report. Mrs. Perieff is staying in the Jewish Homes. The Court stated that a Stay Away Order is not going to reslove the issues. Mr. Ford stated that with the conduct and hostile environment, the matter was reported to APS and that Mr. Perieff will not be able to return home. He withdrew the two Request for Restraining Orders in PED-12-295651, Velva Perieff vs. Rosana Bratt-Perieff and PED-12-295652, Velva Perieff vs. Steve Perieff, and that he requested to retain the two case numbers to move forward with the trust issue. The Court stated that it is not usual to maintain the case numbers filed with the Elder Abuse actions and that new filings will be assigned a different case number. After a recess, Mr. Bridgman demanded to see the report and that he described the inspection. The Court stated that he will need to take it up with APS or Mr. Ford for the report. Mr. Bridgman withrew the two Request for Restraining Orders in PED-12-295686, Steve Perieff vs. Alexander Perieff and PED-12-295687, Steve Perieff vs. Gregory Perieff. The Court encourged everyone to be constructive and to try to work together to solve the problems.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jun-28-2012 Continued To Aug-08-12 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 204

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jun-26-2012 Text Ruling

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar May-23-2012 Continued To Jun-27-12 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case no. PED-12-295651 (Velva Perieff vs. Rosana Bratt-Perieff).

This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder or Dependent Adult Abuse and TRO hearing this day.

Kevin Ford and Thu Nguyen for and with Velva Perieff, Petitioner, present.

Jim Bridgman for and with Rosana Bratt-Perieff, Respondent in PED-12-295651, present.
Jim Bridgman for and with Steve Perieff, Respondent in PED-12-295652, present.

Off the record and outside the presence of the Court, the Parties confer re: settlement.

Back on the record, Mr. Bridgman stated that the Parties have reached a stipulation. The terms of the stipulation are set forth on the record by Mr. Bridgman. The stipulation includes Mr. Bridgman's clients moving immediately into the Chenery Street address, the TRO's set in June being dropped, an evaluation of the home by a qualified person to see if Velva Perieff can return to the home, also an evaluation by a physician as to a return home for Velva Perieff, and Velva Perieff may come to the home with a Social Worker or other relative - not Greg or Alexander. The Court stated that if Velva Perieff returns home then she can obtain a key, that someone should put together a list of the items that Velva Perieff wants so that Steve or Rosana can get them together for her, and that arrangements should be made for pick up of Velma Perieff's items.

All matters, including case nos. PED-12-295686 and PED-12-295687 which are currently set for June 6, 2012, are continued to June 27, 2012 at 2:30 pm in Department 204 before Judge Mary Wiss.

No TRO's are in place.
